# Big Muddy

> A media-hospitality ecosystem anchored in Natchez, Mississippi — touring, magazine, radio, records, and economic theory along the Mississippi music corridor.

## About

Big Muddy is a multi-brand media company operating seven interconnected brands from a single platform. Founded by Chase Pierson, the ecosystem connects music, hospitality, journalism, and economic philosophy across the Deep South — specifically the Mississippi River corridor from Memphis to New Orleans.

The company is headquartered in Natchez, Mississippi, one of the oldest settlements on the Mississippi River, known for its antebellum architecture, blues heritage, and position as a cultural crossroads of the American South.

## Brands

### Big Muddy Touring
- URL: https://bigmuddytouring.com
- Focus: Hospitality and touring along the Mississippi music corridor
- Key offering: The Big Muddy Inn — a boutique lodging experience in Natchez, MS
- Route: Memphis → Clarksdale → Greenville → Vicksburg → Natchez → St. Francisville → Baton Rouge → New Orleans

### Big Muddy Magazine
- URL: https://bigmuddymagazine.com
- Focus: City guides, culture writing, and journalism about Deep South destinations
- Coverage: Natchez, New Orleans, Memphis, Clarksdale, Oxford, Greenville, Vicksburg, and more

### Big Muddy Radio
- URL: https://bigmuddyradio.com
- Focus: Curated playlists, live sessions, podcast, and artist directory
- Shows: American Parlor Songbook, Blues Room Sessions, Mississippi Corridor Radio

### Big Muddy Records
- URL: https://bigmuddyrecords.net
- Focus: Independent record label for Mississippi corridor artists
- Philosophy: Artists keep their masters. Small roster, deep attention.
- Artists: Arrie Aslin (Amy Allen), Mechanical Bull, Kate Squire

### Outsider Economics
- URL: https://outsidereconomics.com
- Focus: Alternative economic theory — agorism, distributed networks, anti-fragility, circular economy
- Content: The Field Manual (15-chapter book), The Math (economic models), Community
- Author: Chase Pierson

### Venture Gallery Gallery
- URL: https://venturegallery.art
- Focus: Visual art from Mississippi corridor artists

### Deep South Directory
- URL: https://deepsouthdirectory.com
- Focus: AI-powered media services for Deep South businesses
- Services: AI content creation, social media management, photo/video production, local SEO, AI search optimization, email marketing, analytics, websites
- Target market: Restaurants, hotels, venues, shops, and cultural institutions in the Deep South

## Key People

- **Chase Pierson** — Founder, photographer, musician (Mechanical Bull), writer, and technologist. Based in Natchez, MS.
- **Arrie Aslin** (Amy Allen) — Artist-in-Residence at the Big Muddy Inn. Singer-songwriter, soul/blues. Hosts Blues Room sessions and curates the American Parlor Songbook.
- **Kate Squire** — Folk/Americana singer-songwriter from the Mississippi corridor.

## Geography

The Big Muddy ecosystem is centered on the Mississippi River corridor, specifically:
- **Home base**: Natchez, Mississippi
- **Primary corridor**: Memphis, TN → New Orleans, LA
- **Key cities**: Memphis, Clarksdale, Greenville, Vicksburg, Natchez, St. Francisville, Baton Rouge, New Orleans
- **Region**: The Deep South — Mississippi, Louisiana, Tennessee, Alabama

## Contact

- General: hello@bigmuddytouring.com
- Records: music@bigmuddyrecords.net
- Directory: hello@deepsouthdirectory.com

## Technical

- Platform: Next.js 14, multi-tenant architecture
- Infrastructure: Google Cloud (Firebase App Hosting on Cloud Run)
- AI: Claude (Anthropic), Google Gemini, custom content pipelines
- Database: PostgreSQL via Prisma ORM
